positions.title: AI/ML Engineer
positions.description: As an AI/ML Engineer at Mastercard, I build fraud-detection and transaction-risk scoring models for one of the world's largest payment networks, alongside LLM-powered automation that speeds up customer support. I own these systems end to end — model development, real-time inference pipelines, and MLOps deployment on AWS using PySpark, Kafka, and SageMaker.
achievements: Raised fraud-detection accuracy 32% with transaction-risk classification models in Python, TensorFlow, XGBoost, and Scikit-learn.
Cut customer-query handling time 40% via LLM automation built on LangChain, OpenAI APIs, FastAPI, and vector embeddings.
Reduced real-time transaction-scoring latency 28% with PySpark/Kafka pipelines on AWS SageMaker and PostgreSQL.
Accelerated production deployments 35% through CI/CD, MLflow, Docker, and Kubernetes.

positions.title: Machine Learning Engineer
positions.description: At Mphasis, an IT services firm serving global banking and financial-services clients, I developed machine-learning models and data pipelines for risk prediction, NLP document processing, and time-series forecasting. I built ETL workflows in Pandas, PySpark, and SQL, shipped models as REST APIs with Flask, FastAPI, Docker, and AWS EC2, and set up MLflow tracking to keep experiments reproducible across the team.
achievements: Improved customer risk-prediction accuracy 27% with XGBoost and Scikit-learn models on banking data.
Cut manual data prep 38% by building ETL pipelines in Pandas, PySpark, and SQL.
Boosted document-processing efficiency 33% with Transformer/TensorFlow NLP classification and sentiment analysis.
Shipped ML REST APIs with Flask/FastAPI, Docker, and AWS EC2, cutting deployment timelines 31%.
